wiki.summary: “Tell U Sum” showcases Che’s melodic side as he sings over a distorted and tropical-sounding instrumental. The instrumental, courtesy of CXO, consists of accordion, strings and synths, while hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion fill out the rest. The track would release as the first track to Che’s two-track EP, Para'dies, on April 24, 2026. One day later, on April 25, Che released the music video for “Tell U Sum”, which was directed by Che’s creative director PoppyGavin, and shot by Gekaay. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “Tell U Sum” showcases Che’s melodic side as he sings over a distorted and tropical-sounding instrumental. The instrumental, courtesy of CXO, consists of accordion, strings and synths, while hard-hitting bass and fast-paced percussion fill out the rest. The track would release as the first track to Che’s two-track EP, Para'dies, on April 24, 2026. One day later, on April 25, Che released the music video for “Tell U Sum”, which was directed by Che’s creative director PoppyGavin, and shot by Gekaay. The video was inspired by the music video for Kanye West’s 2013 hit, Bound 2. Read more on Last.fm.
